channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Minimalist roguelike KAZ will be releasing in July
item.content:encoded:
If you have been waiting for another fast paced roguelike that uses a simple concept then you may want to check out KAZ. It is a grid based roguelike in which title character Kaz battles through different levels with rhythm, using spells and buffs to take out enemies across 145 quests. Today, developer Kalinarm confirmed that KAZ will be launching on July 13th.

In the announcement post about the KAZ release date, Kalinarm wrote, “Over the last few months, KAZ has changed a lot thanks to all the feedback, bug reports, suggestions, and support from everyone who’s played the demo. It’s been amazing seeing people discover the game, push crazy builds, and chase high scores. If you’ve been following the game so far, thank you. Your support has meant the world to me. And if you’re discovering KAZ for the first time during Next Fest, welcome! I hope you’ll have fun embracing the chaos.”

If you want to check out the KAZ demo, you can grab it on Steam now.

Source: Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/15/minimalist-roguelike-kaz-will-be-releasing-in-july/
